app.name: GST Intelligence Magic
app.demoFooter: Demo environment. Verify all recommendations before GST filing.

landing.headline: Stop GST ITC leaks before they become penalties
landing.subheadline: Upload invoices and GSTR-2B, and get a clear mismatch report with suggested next actions.
landing.point1: Catch ITC mismatches against supplier filing
landing.disclaimer: Demo tool only. Not legal or tax advice.

auth.consentLabel: I accept the Terms, Privacy Policy, and acknowledge this is a free demo service. Outputs are advisory and I will validate before filing.
auth.consentRequired: You must accept terms and disclaimer to continue.

legal.tocNote: This website is a testing/demo service for GST reconciliation workflows.
legal.liability: You are responsible for validating all outputs before any legal or tax filing.
legal.freeService: This is a free demo service and no liability is accepted for indirect loss or filing decisions.

about.title: GST Intelligence Magic: About & Architecture
about.subtitle: Built to showcase practical GST intelligence workflows for CAs and Indian SMBs with demo-grade AI experiences.
about.architectureText: Upload and document parsing feed a model-routed reconciliation engine. The pipeline scores GST risk, generates actions, and exposes report/chat/voice interfaces.
about.decisionText: Input type controls extraction path, then rule engines classify mismatches and prioritize the next action for accountants.
about.featuresText: Designed for demo depth and realistic accountant workflows.
about.voiceText: Live voice mode and contextual narrations make the demo easier to present to judges and business users.

hub.title: GST Action Workspace
hub.subtitle: Action-first GST reconciliation workspace for CA and SMB teams.
